title: poa supina var. foucaudii
intro: Poa supina var. foucaudii, also known as Foucault's fescue, is a variety of the Poa supina plant, a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Foucault's fescue include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Poa supina var. foucaudii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
